info.name: Crypto-Payment OpenAPI
info.description:
Crypto-Payment service OpenAPI collection. Base URL: http://{{host}}:8079/crypto-payment

Authentication: HMAC-based signature. Headers required: appId, timestamp, sign (HMAC-SHA256 of request body with secretKey).

item.name: PayIn

exec: // // HMAC-SHA256 加密并输出为 Base64
// const hash = CryptoJS.HmacSHA256(message, secretKey); // 使用 HMAC-SHA256 算法加密
// const base64Encoded = CryptoJS.enc.Base64.stringify(hash); // 转换为 Base64 编码

request.description:
Create a new payment order.

**Required fields:**
- `mchTxnId` (string, max 60) - Merchant transaction ID
- `txnAmount` (string, max 20) - Transaction amount, up to 2 decimal places
- `currency` (string, max 8) - Currency code (e.g. SGD, USD)
- `checkoutMode` (enum) - CRYPTO_WALLET | FIAT | DIRECT_CRYPTO | DIRECT_FIAT
- `notificationUrl` (string, max 300) - Payment result notification URL

**Optional fields:**
- `payMethod1`, `payMethod2` (string, max 20) - Payment methods
- `successReturnUrl`, `failReturnUrl`, `pendingReturnUrl` (string, max 300)
- `source` (string, max 20)
- `txnTitle` (string, max 30), `txnDesc` (string, max 60)
- `accountInfo.toAddress` - Merchant receiving address
- `payerInfo.uid` - User ID
- `mchExtInfo` (string, max 512) - Merchant extension info
- `lifetime` (long) - Order lifetime in milliseconds
- `paymentPurpose`, `merchantInNote`
- `paymentCurrency` (string, max 10) - Payment currency for fiat orders (USDT/USDC)

**Response:**
```json
{
  "code": "200",
  "msg": "success",
  "data": {
    "txnId": "TXN001",
    "mchTxnId": "MCH_123",
    "httplink": "https://pay.paydify.com/checkout/xxx",
    "deeplink": "paydify://pay/xxx",
    "qrCode": "xxx",
    "state": "PENDING",
    "errorMsg": null
  }
}
```

item.name: Get Payment Status查询支付状态

exec: // // HMAC-SHA256 加密并输出为 Base64
// const hash = CryptoJS.HmacSHA256(message, secretKey); // 使用 HMAC-SHA256 算法加密
// const base64Encoded = CryptoJS.enc.Base64.stringify(hash); // 转换为 Base64 编码

request.description:
Query payment order status. Supports batch query by comma-separated txnId.

**Fields (at least one required):**
- `txnId` (string, max 500) - Paydify transaction ID, supports comma-separated for batch query
- `mchTxnId` (string, max 100) - Merchant transaction ID

**Response:** List of payment status objects
```json
{
  "code": "200",
  "data": [{
    "txnId": "TXN001",
    "mchTxnId": "MCH_123",
    "txnHash": "0x...",
    "txnAmount": "100.00",
    "paidAmount": "100.00",
    "mchReceivedAmount": "99.50",
    "mchFee": "0.50",
    "mchFeeRate": "0.5",
    "currency": "SGD",
    "gasFee": "1.00",
    "gasFeeCurrency": "USDT",
    "payMethod1": "CRYPTO",
    "payMethod2": "USDT",
    "appId": "APP001",
    "state": "SUCCESS",
    "refundType": null,
    "failType": null,
    "mchExtInfo": "",
    "errorMsg": null,
    "envType": "TEST",
    "fromAddress": "0x...",
    "checkoutMode": "CRYPTO_WALLET",
    "paidTime": "2025-01-01T12:00:00",
    "failedTime": null,
    "expiredTime": null,
    "createdTime": "2025-01-01T11:55:00",
    "successReturnUrl": "https://...",
    "failReturnUrl": "https://...",
    "pendingReturnUrl": "https://...",
    "channelTxnId": "CH001",
    "orderCurrency": "SGD",
    "settlementCurrency": "USDT"
  }]
}
```

**state values:** PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, EXPIRED, CANCELLED
**refundType values:** NONE, PARTIAL, FULL
**failType values:** TIMEOUT, INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE, USER_CANCELLED, etc.

exec: // // HMAC-SHA256 加密并输出为 Base64
// const hash = CryptoJS.HmacSHA256(message, secretKey); // 使用 HMAC-SHA256 算法加密
// const base64Encoded = CryptoJS.enc.Base64.stringify(hash); // 转换为 Base64 编码

request.description:
Create a refund request.

**Required fields:**
- `mchTxnId` (string, max 60) - Merchant transaction ID
- `paymentTxnId` (string, max 30) - Original payment transaction ID
- `type` (enum) - Refund responsibility: `merchant` (on-chain refund, requires txnHash) | `platform` (API/custodial wallet refund, requires refundAmount)

**Conditional fields:**
- `refundAmount` (string, max 32) - Required for platform refunds (Gate.io); optional for on-chain refunds
- `txnHash` (string, max 120) - Required for on-chain refunds (BGW); not needed for Gate.io refunds

**Optional:**
- `mchExtInfo` (string, max 512)

**Response:**
```json
{
  "code": "200",
  "data": {
    "refundTxnId": "RF001",
    "paymentTxnId": "TXN001",
    "mchTxnId": "MCH_123",
    "state": "INIT",
    "errorMsg": null
  }
}
```

item.name: Get Refund Status查询退款状态

exec: // // HMAC-SHA256 加密并输出为 Base64

request.description:
Query refund status. At least one of refundTxnId, mchTxnId, or paymentTxnId should be provided.

**Fields (at least one required):**
- `refundTxnId` - Refund transaction ID
- `mchTxnId` - Merchant transaction ID
- `paymentTxnId` - Payment transaction ID

**Response:** List of refund status objects
```json
{
  "code": "200",
  "data": [{
    "refundTxnId": "RF001",
    "txnHash": "0x...",
    "paymentTxnId": "TXN001",
    "txnAmount": "50.00",
    "currency": "SGD",
    "payMethod1": "CRYPTO",
    "payMethod2": "USDT",
    "mchTxnId": "MCH_123",
    "appId": "APP001",
    "envType": "TEST",
    "mchExtInfo": "",
    "errorMsg": null,
    "state": "refunded",
    "refundedTime": "2025-01-02T10:00:00",
    "createdTime": "2025-01-02T09:50:00",
    "updatedTime": "2025-01-02T10:00:00"
  }]
}
```

**state values:** init, pending, refunded, failed

**Required fields:**

```json
    "summaryFileUrl": "https://...",
    "summaryFileName": "summary_20250115.csv",
    "detailFileUrl": "https://...",
    "detailFileName": "detail_20250115.csv"
  }]
}
```

request.description:
Get a quote for fiat/stablecoin conversion. Supports both directions:
- Fiat -> Stablecoin (e.g., SGD -> USDT)
- Stablecoin -> Fiat (e.g., USDT -> SGD)

**Required fields:**
- `fromCurrency` (string) - Source currency (e.g. SGD, USD, USDT, USDC)
- `toCurrency` (string) - Target currency (e.g. USDT, USDC, SGD, USD)
- `amount` (string) - Amount in source currency

**Response:**
```json
{
  "code": "200",
  "data": {
    "fromCurrency": "SGD",
    "toCurrency": "USDT",
    "fromAmount": "100.00",
    "toAmount": "74.1234",
    "precision": 4,
    "roundingMode": "CEIL"
  }
}
```

**precision:** 4 for stablecoin (fiat->stablecoin), 2 for fiat (stablecoin->fiat)
**roundingMode:** CEIL for stablecoin, FLOOR for fiat

item.description: PayIn API - Merchant payment collection接口

item.name: QR Pay

request.description:
Scan and parse a QR code.

**Required fields:**
- `codeValue` - QR code information
- `customerId` - Customer ID
- `clientIP` - Client IP address

**Optional fields:**
- `clientId`, `clientType` - Authentication (can also be in header)
- `currency` - Currency code
- `amount` - Amount (positive, max 6 decimal places)
- `custName`, `custFirstName`, `custLastName` - Customer name
- `custNationCode` - Customer country code
- `legalNationCode` - ID document country code
- `legalId` - ID number
- `legalType` - ID type (ID | PP)
- `mobile` - Mobile (international format, e.g. +5491234567890)
- `email` - Email address
- `gender` - MALE | FEMALE
- `dataCryptoIV`, `qrType`, `isKycUser`

**Response:**
```json
{
  "code": "200",
  "data": {
    "txnId": "TXN001",
    "qrCode": "PROMPT_PAY",
    "needCashier": "Y",
    "cashierSuppInfos": [],
    "cashierExtInfo": "",
    "acqCurrency": "PHP",
    "acqAmount": "100.50",
    "payCurrency": "USDT",
    "payAmount": "1.80",
    "payeeInfo": "",
    "payeeInfoDetail": {
      "merchantId": "M001",
      "merchantName": "Test Merchant",
      "mobilePhone": "",
      "bankCode": "",
      "bankName": "",
      "bankAccount": "",
      "bankAccountName": ""
    },
    "goodInfo": "",
    "remark": "",
    "expiryTime": "2025-01-01T12:10:00",
    "promoInfo": [],
    "rateInfo": {
      "baseCurrency": "USDT",
      "quoteCurrency": "PHP",
      "rate": 55.80
    },
    "redirectUrl": "",
    "extInfo": "",
    "sdkActionType": "",
    "sdkActionPayload": "",
    "usdAmount": "1.80",
    "minAmount": "1.00",
    "maxAmount": "5000.00",
    "toChainInfo": [
      { "toChain": "TRON", "toChainAddress": "T..." }
    ],
    "remainingAmount": "5000.00",
    "maxSingleAmount": "1000.00",
    "feeAmount": "0.50",
    "payQuotes": [
      { "payCurrency": "USDT", "payAmount": "1.80", "indicativeRate": "55.80" }
    ]
  }
}
```

Create a QR payment order. Same as ScanPay but with additional `txnId` field.

**Required fields:** same as ScanPay
- `codeValue`, `customerId`, `clientIP`

**Additional field:**
- `txnId` - Transaction ID (from scanpay response)

**Response:** Same structure as ScanPay response.

Payment result notification callback.

**Required fields:**
- `txnId` - Paydify transaction ID

**Optional fields:**
- `clientId`, `signature`, `timestamp`, `clientType` - Authentication
- `partnerPaymentId` - Payment order number
- `payCurrency`, `payAmount` - Payment currency and amount
- `payTime` - Payment time
- `payState` - Payment state (WalletPayStateEnum)
- `failType` - Failure type (QrPayFailTypeEnum)
- `extInfo` - Extension info
- `payChain`, `payTxnHash` - Payment chain and transaction hash
- `backChain`, `backChainAddress` - Refund chain info

**Response:**
```json
{
  "code": "200",
  "data": {
    "txnId": "TXN001",
    "partnerPaymentId": "PAY_001",
    "orderState": "S",
    "extInfo": "",
    "failReson": null,
    "backTxnHash": null
  }
}
```

Query QR payment order status.

**Required fields:**
- `txnId` - Paydify transaction ID

**Optional:**
- `clientId`, `signature`, `timestamp`, `clientType` - Authentication
- `extInfo` - Extension info

**Response:**
```json
{
  "code": "200",
  "data": {
    "txnId": "TXN001",
    "partnerPaymentId": "PAY_001",
    "payCurrency": "USDT",
    "payAmount": "1.80",
    "orderState": "S",
    "extInfo": "",
    "usdAmount": "1.80",
    "failReson": null,
    "backTxnHash": null
  }
}
```

**orderState:** S=Success, F=Failed, P=Processing

item.name: QR Code Query查询支持二维码列表
Get Payment Code (Merchant Scan)获取支付码（被扫）

request.description:
Get payment code for merchant-presented QR (merchant scans customer's QR).

**Required fields:**
- `qrCodeType` - QR code type
- `customerId` - Customer ID
- `region` - Region/country code
- `deviceTokenId` - Device token ID
- `clientIP` - Client IP
- `codeQuantity` - Number of codes (1-10)

**Optional:**
- `clientId`, `clientType` - Authentication
- `extInfo` - Extension info

**Response:**
```json
{
  "code": "200",
  "data": {
    "paymentCodes": [
      {
        "paymentCode": "1234567890",
        "codeEffectiveTime": "1704067200000",
        "codeExpiryTime": "1704067260000"
      }
    ],
    "extInfo": ""
  }
}
```

item.description: QR Code Payment API - 扫码支付接口

item.name: Payout
Batch Payout Apply批量提现申请

exec: // // HMAC-SHA256 加密并输出为 Base64
// const hash = CryptoJS.HmacSHA256(message, secretKey); // 使用 HMAC-SHA256 算法加密
// const base64Encoded = CryptoJS.enc.Base64.stringify(hash); // 转换为 Base64 编码

request.description:
Apply for a batch payout (1-500 transfers per batch).

**Required fields:**
- `mchBatchId` (string) - Merchant batch ID (idempotency key)
- `batchName` (string) - Batch name
- `currency` (string) - Currency (e.g. USDT)
- `totalAmount` (BigDecimal) - Total amount
- `totalCount` (Integer) - Total transfer count
- `transferDetailList` (List, 1-500 items) - Transfer details
  - `mchDetailId` (string) - Detail ID
  - `transferAmount` (BigDecimal) - Transfer amount
  - `network` (string) - Network: BSC | SOL | ETH | TRON | POLYGON
  - `address` (string) - Destination address
  - `remark` (string, optional) - Remark

**Response:**
```json
{
  "code": "200",
  "data": {
    "batchId": "BAT001",
    "mchBatchId": "BATCH_123",
    "status": "INIT"
  }
}
```

request.description:
Query batch payout status.

**Fields (at least one of batchId/mchBatchId):**
- `batchId` - Paydify batch ID
- `mchBatchId` - Merchant batch ID
- `detailStatus` - Filter by detail status: INIT | PROCESSING | SUCCESS | FAILED

**Response:**

```json
      {
        "detailId": "DET001",

        "errorCode": null,
        "errorMsg": null,

}
```

request.description:
Apply for a single withdrawal.

**Required fields:**
- `mchWithdrawId` (string, max 60) - Merchant withdrawal ID (idempotency key)
- `amount` (string) - Withdrawal amount
- `currency` (string, max 8) - Currency code
- `network` (string, max 10) - Network: BSC | SOL | ETH | TRON | POLYGON
- `address` (string, max 255) - Destination address

**Optional:**
- `memo` (string, max 128) - Memo/tag for certain chains

**Response:**
```json
{
  "code": "200",
  "data": {
    "withdrawId": "WD001"
  }
}
```

request.description:
Query withdrawal detail.

**Required fields:**
- `mchWithdrawId` - Merchant withdrawal ID

**Response:**
```json
{

    "mchWithdrawId": "WD_12345",
    "mid": "MID001",
    "appId": "APP001",
    "currency": "USDT",
    "network": "TRON",

    "txnHash": "0x...",
    "status": "SUCCESS",
    "amount": "100.00",
    "gasFee": "1.00",
    "processingFee": "0.50",
    "processingFeeRate": "0.005",
    "totalDeductedAmount": "101.50",
    "memo": "",
    "createTime": "2025-01-01T10:00:00",
    "finishTime": "2025-01-01T10:05:00",
    "errorCode": null,
    "errorMsg": null
  }
}
```

**status values:** PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED

item.description: Payout API - 提现/代付接口

item.name: Fiat Withdraw

exec: // // HMAC-SHA256 加密并输出为 Base64
// const hash = CryptoJS.HmacSHA256(message, secretKey); // 使用 HMAC-SHA256 算法加密
// const base64Encoded = CryptoJS.enc.Base64.stringify(hash); // 转换为 Base64 编码

request.description:
获取法币提现报价预览（无副作用，不创建订单）。

**报价模式 quoteMode:**
- `ARRIVAL` — 按到账金额报价，需填 `arrivalAmount`
- `DEDUCT_ASSET` — 按扣减稳定币金额报价，需填 `assetCode` + `deductAmount`

**必填字段:**
- `quoteMode` (string) — 报价模式: ARRIVAL | DEDUCT_ASSET
- `bankAccountId` (string) — 目标银行账户ID
- `arrivalCurrency` (string) — 到账法币币种 (ISO 4217, 如 USD/EUR/HKD)，必须在商户已签约法币范围内

**模式 ARRIVAL 时必填:**
- `arrivalAmount` (string) — 到账金额（币种 = arrivalCurrency）

**模式 DEDUCT_ASSET 时必填:**
- `assetCode` (string) — 扣减稳定币代码 (如 USDC/USDT)
- `deductAmount` (string) — 扣减金额

**Response:**
```json
{
  "code": "200",
  "data": {
    "quoteId": "QT_xxx",
    "quoteMode": "ARRIVAL",
    "expireAt": "2025-01-01T12:05:00",
    "bankAccountId": "BA_001",
    "bankAccountInfo": {
      "bankAccountId": "BA_001",
      "beneficiaryBankBic": "BOFAUS3N",
      "beneficiaryAccountNumber": "****6789",
      "beneficiaryAccountName": "John Doe",
      "correspondentBankBic": "",
      "beneficiaryAddress": "",
      "beneficiaryBankName": "Bank of America",
      "beneficiaryBankAddress": "",
      "beneficiaryCountry": "US"
    },
    "arrivalAmount": "1000.00",
    "arrivalCurrency": "USD",
    "feeAmountFiat": "5.00",
    "chargeAmountFiat": "1005.00",
    "lockedRateSnapshot": "{\"USDC\":1.0}",
    "deductionPlan": [
      {
        "assetCode": "USDC",
        "deductAmount": "1005.00",
        "principalAmount": "1000.00",
        "feeAmount": "5.00",
        "sequence": 1
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

exec: // // HMAC-SHA256 加密并输出为 Base64
// const hash = CryptoJS.HmacSHA256(message, secretKey); // 使用 HMAC-SHA256 算法加密
// const base64Encoded = CryptoJS.enc.Base64.stringify(hash); // 转换为 Base64 编码

request.description:
发起法币提现（幂等键: mchOrderId）。需先调用 Quote 接口获取 quoteId。

**必填字段:**
- `mchOrderId` (string, max 128) — 商户订单号（幂等键）
- `quoteId` (string, max 64) — 报价会话ID（来自 Quote 接口返回）

**Response:**
```json
{
  "code": "200",
  "data": {
    "withdrawOrderId": "FW001",
    "mchOrderId": "FW_12345",
    "quoteId": "QT_xxx",
    "status": "PENDING",
    "arrivalAmount": "1000.00",
    "arrivalCurrency": "USD",
    "feeAmountFiat": "5.00",
    "chargeAmountFiat": "1005.00",
    "deductionSnapshot": {
      "deductionPlan": [
        {
          "assetCode": "USDC",
          "deductAmount": "1005.00",
          "principalAmount": "1000.00",
          "feeAmount": "5.00",
          "sequence": 1
        }
      ]
    },
    "bankAccountInfo": {
      "bankAccountId": "BA_001",
      "beneficiaryBankBic": "BOFAUS3N",
      "beneficiaryAccountNumber": "****6789",
      "beneficiaryAccountName": "John Doe",
      "correspondentBankBic": "",
      "beneficiaryAddress": "",
      "beneficiaryBankName": "Bank of America",
      "beneficiaryBankAddress": "",
      "beneficiaryCountry": "US"
    },

}
```

request.description:
查询法币提现订单列表（分页）。

**可选字段:**
- `status` (string) — 状态过滤 (PENDING / PROCESSING / SETTLING / COMPLETED / CANCELLED / REJECTED / FAILED)
- `startTime` (string) — 开始时间 (ISO 8601)
- `endTime` (string) — 结束时间 (ISO 8601)
- `pageNo` (int, >=1, default 1) — 页码
- `pageSize` (int, 1-100, default 20) — 每页条数

**Response:**
```json
{
  "code": "200",
  "data": {
    "pageInfo": {
      "currentPage": 1,
      "pageSize": 20,
      "totalPages": 1,
      "totalCount": 2,
      "hasNext": false,
      "hasPrevious": false
    },
    "list": [
      {
        "withdrawOrderId": "FW001",
        "status": "COMPLETED",
        "quoteMode": "ARRIVAL",
        "feeAmountFiat": "5.00",
        "chargeAmountFiat": "1005.00",
        "deductionSnapshot": {
          "deductionPlan": [
            {
              "assetCode": "USDC",
              "deductAmount": "1005.00",
              "principalAmount": "1000.00",
              "feeAmount": "5.00",
              "sequence": 1
            }
          ]
        },
        "withdrawAmount": "1005.00",
        "withdrawCurrency": "USDC",
        "arrivalAmount": "1000.00",
        "arrivalCurrency": "USD",
        "createdAt": "2025-01-01T10:00:00"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

request.description:
查询法币提现订单详情（withdrawOrderId 和 mchOrderId 二选一）。

**字段 (withdrawOrderId / mchOrderId 二选一):**
- `withdrawOrderId` (string, max 64) — 提现单号
- `mchOrderId` (string, max 128) — 商户订单号

**Response:**
```json
{
  "code": "200",
  "data": {
    "withdrawOrderId": "FW001",
    "status": "COMPLETED",
    "quoteMode": "ARRIVAL",
    "feeAmountFiat": "5.00",
    "chargeAmountFiat": "1005.00",
    "deductionSnapshot": {
      "deductionPlan": [
        {
          "assetCode": "USDC",
          "deductAmount": "1005.00",
          "principalAmount": "1000.00",
          "feeAmount": "5.00",
          "sequence": 1
        }
      ]
    },
    "withdrawAmount": "1005.00",
    "withdrawCurrency": "USDC",
    "feeAmount": "5.00",
    "deductionAmount": "1005.00",
    "arrivalAmount": "1000.00",
    "arrivalCurrency": "USD",
    "exchangeRate": "1.000000",
    "bankAccountInfo": {
      "bankAccountId": "BA_001",

    },
```
